measures.name: Margem Gauge SVG
measures.expression: VAR _Rate = [Margem Bruta %] VAR _Grade = SWITCH( TRUE(), _Rate >= 0.5, "A+", _Rate >= 0.4, "A", _Rate >= 0.3, "B", _Rate >= 0.2, "C", "D" ) VAR _Formatted = FORMAT( _Rate * 100, "0.0" ) VAR _ColorFilled = SWITCH( TRUE(), _Rate >= 0.4, "#2E7D32", _Rate >= 0.2, "#F9A825", "#D22B2B" ) VAR _ColorEmpty = "#2F3E46" VAR _Radius = 40 VAR _Circumference = 2 * PI() * _Radius VAR _FilledDash = _Rate * _Circumference VAR _Svg = "data:image/svg+xml;utf8," & "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 100 100'>" & "<circle cx='50' cy='50' r='" & _Radius & "' fill='none' stroke='" & _ColorEmpty & "' stroke-width='12'/>" & "<circle cx='50' cy='50' r='" & _Radius & "' fill='none' stroke='" & _ColorFilled & "' stroke-width='12' stroke-dasharray='" & _FilledDash & " " & _Circumference & "' transform='rotate(-90 50 50)' stroke-linecap='round'/>" & "<circle cx='50' cy='50' r='32' fill='white' stroke='#1a1a1a' stroke-width='1'/>" & "<text x='50' y='44' text-anchor='middle' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='12' font-weight='bold' fill='" & _ColorFilled & "'>" & _Grade & "</text>" & "<text x='50' y='64' text-anchor='middle' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='16' font-weight='bold' fill='" & _ColorFilled & "'>" & _Formatted & "%</text>" & "</svg>" RETURN _Svg

measures.name: Receita KPI SVG
measures.expression: VAR _Val = [Receita Bruta] VAR _PY = [Receita Ano Anterior] VAR _YoY = DIVIDE( _Val - _PY, _PY ) VAR _ValLabel = FORMAT( _Val, "R$ #,0,,.0 M" ) VAR _YoYLabel = FORMAT( _YoY, "+0.0%;-0.0%;0%" ) VAR _Color = IF( _YoY >= 0, "#2E7D32", "#D22B2B" ) VAR _Arrow = IF( _YoY >= 0, "<polygon points='170,36 177,26 184,36' fill='" & _Color & "'/>", "<polygon points='170,26 177,36 184,26' fill='" & _Color & "'/>" ) RETURN "data:image/svg+xml;utf8," & "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 90'>" & "<text x='10' y='22' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='12' fill='#888' font-weight='600'>RECEITA BRUTA</text>" & "<text x='10' y='58' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='28' fill='#1a1a1a' font-weight='700'>" & _ValLabel & "</text>" & _Arrow & "<text x='192' y='36' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='13' fill='" & _Color & "' font-weight='700'>" & _YoYLabel & "</text>" & "<text x='192' y='52' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='10' fill='#888'>vs ano anterior</text>" & "</svg>"

measures.name: Crescimento Progress SVG
measures.expression: VAR _Rate = [Crescimento YoY %] VAR _Abs = ABS( _Rate ) VAR _Cap = MIN( _Abs, 1 ) VAR _BarW = _Cap * 260 VAR _Label = FORMAT( _Rate, "+0.0%;-0.0%;0%" ) VAR _Color = SWITCH( TRUE(), _Rate >= 0.1, "#2E7D32", _Rate >= 0, "#66A05A", _Rate >= -0.1, "#F9A825", "#D22B2B" ) RETURN "data:image/svg+xml;utf8," & "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 90'>" & "<text x='10' y='22' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='12' fill='#888' font-weight='600'>CRESCIMENTO YoY</text>" & "<text x='10' y='54' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='26' fill='" & _Color & "' font-weight='700'>" & _Label & "</text>" & "<rect x='10' y='68' width='260' height='10' fill='#E8E8E8' rx='5'/>" & "<rect x='10' y='68' width='" & _BarW & "' height='10' fill='" & _Color & "' rx='5'/>" & "</svg>"

measures.name: Ticket Medio SVG
measures.expression: VAR _Val = [Ticket Medio] VAR _Clientes = [Total Clientes Ativos] VAR _Vendas = [Total Vendas] VAR _ValLabel = FORMAT( _Val, "R$ #,0.00" ) VAR _ClientesLabel = FORMAT( _Clientes, "#,0" ) VAR _VendasLabel = FORMAT( _Vendas, "#,0" ) RETURN "data:image/svg+xml;utf8," & "<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 90'>" & "<text x='10' y='22' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='12' fill='#888' font-weight='600'>TICKET MEDIO</text>" & "<text x='10' y='58' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='28' fill='#2B7A78' font-weight='700'>" & _ValLabel & "</text>" & "<text x='10' y='80' font-family='Segoe UI' font-size='11' fill='#666'>" & _VendasLabel & " vendas | " & _ClientesLabel & " clientes</text>" & "</svg>"
